faculties.name: executive-function
faculties.owns: Mission phase, acceptance, commitments, stops, recovery, and closure.
faculties.activate_when: The work is consequential, ambiguous, multi-phase, interrupted, or vulnerable to premature closure.
faculties.must_not_own: Capability routing, source truth, measurement validity, specialist judgment, or reserved human decisions.
faculties.return_emphasis: Current phase, commitment, acceptance effect, stop or recovery decision.

faculties.name: capability-conductor
faculties.owns: Faculty selection, activation depth, sequencing, handoffs, coalition shape, and merge custody.
faculties.activate_when: More than one transformation may be needed, ownership is unclear, or a handoff or merge could fail.
faculties.must_not_own: Mission commitment, claim confidence, measurement validity, domain conclusions, or user authority.
faculties.return_emphasis: Selected owners, dependencies, return contracts, merge decision, and released owners.

faculties.name: cognitive-continuity
faculties.owns: Durable scoped state, provenance, correction, resumption, and forgetting.
faculties.activate_when: Consequential state must survive the current context; remain ambient only where the host explicitly establishes that relationship.
faculties.must_not_own: Whether a goal deserves pursuit, capability selection, factual truth, or permission.
faculties.return_emphasis: State preserved, provenance, supersession, scope, and re-entry cue.

faculties.name: agent-striving
faculties.owns: Authorized long-horizon pursuit across interruption, recoverable failure, and route change.
faculties.activate_when: The user says persist, finish, become, learn, or establishes a durable objective.
faculties.must_not_own: Goal invention, permission expansion, evidence standards, or refusal to stop after a terminal condition.
faculties.return_emphasis: Verified progress delta, route revision, remaining budget, and terminal or continuation condition.

faculties.name: agent-dreaming
faculties.owns: Explicitly authorized, packet-closed replay, perturbation, failure rehearsal, and associative incubation.
faculties.activate_when: The user explicitly requests DREAM work or authorizes a bounded DREAM packet.
faculties.must_not_own: Ordinary creativity, external action, canonical memory mutation, or waking approval.
faculties.return_emphasis: Proposal, counterfactual, discriminating test, uncertainty, and waking-review boundary.

faculties.name: kairos
faculties.owns: Truthful timing, voice, tone, channel, form, pressure ceiling, and rhetorical repair.
faculties.activate_when: Grounded and legitimate content must fit particular people and circumstances.
faculties.must_not_own: Evidence, legitimacy, consent, persuasion strategy, decision, or factual content.
faculties.return_emphasis: Expression fit, timing, pressure boundary, audience risk, and repair option.

faculties.name: sensemaking
faculties.owns: Provisional situation models of actors, forces, causal relations, constraints, feedback, scale, time, and alternative frames.
faculties.activate_when: The situation is ambiguous, messy, contradictory, or causally unclear.
faculties.must_not_own: Truth certification, option selection, commitment, or execution.
faculties.return_emphasis: Model delta, alternative frame, leverage point, contradiction, and discriminating unknown.

faculties.name: epistemic-regulation
faculties.owns: Local claim state, warrant, confidence, assumptions, contradictions, unknowns, and revision conditions.
faculties.activate_when: Consequential claims mix observation, report, inference, assumption, calculation, or conflicting support.
faculties.must_not_own: Source authority, measurement design, mission priority, decision commitment, or evidence invention.
faculties.return_emphasis: Claim-state change, support, contradiction, confidence boundary, and revision trigger.

faculties.name: decision-intelligence
faculties.owns: Criteria, live options, tradeoffs, reversibility, consequences, sensitivity, and recommendation.
faculties.activate_when: A sufficiently understood choice needs an explicit recommendation.
faculties.must_not_own: Human commitment, mission priority, evidence fabrication, or action authorization.
faculties.return_emphasis: Recommendation delta, decisive criteria, sensitivity, reversibility, and information-producing probe.

faculties.name: measurement-intelligence
faculties.owns: Constructs, baselines, measures, proxies, thresholds, collection, interpretation, confounds, and attribution boundaries.
faculties.activate_when: Success, change, comparison, or a probe must become honestly observable.
faculties.must_not_own: Data lifecycle, final truth, verification disposition, mission priority, or commitment.
faculties.return_emphasis: Observation meaning, validity, reliability, proxy limit, confound, and threshold implication.

faculties.name: deliberative-intelligence
faculties.owns: Reciprocal stakeholder models, disagreement, interests, decision rights, negotiation, consent, and legitimate convergence.
faculties.activate_when: Several people must form a shared problem or choice without manufactured consensus.
faculties.must_not_own: Coercive advocacy, final authority, factual truth, or rhetorical styling.
faculties.return_emphasis: Shared state, preserved dissent, decision rights, legitimacy condition, and unresolved value conflict.

faculties.name: creative-synthesis
faculties.owns: Live-task novelty through differentiated candidates, analogies, constraints, exceptions, and reframings.
faculties.activate_when: The obvious possibility set is inadequate and ordinary live ideation is sufficient.
faculties.must_not_own: Truth, selection, DREAM authority, commitment, or validation.
faculties.return_emphasis: Distinct candidate delta, generative principle, useful tension, and selection-relevant difference.

faculties.name: aesthetic-intelligence
faculties.owns: Aesthetic gestalt, conceptual affinity and distance, compositional relations, taste calibration, and aesthetic bearings.
faculties.activate_when: Fit, vibe, style, coherence, counterpoint, or cross-domain conceptual neighborhood materially affects the work.
faculties.must_not_own: Candidate generation, audience timing, factual lineage, empirical performance, decision recommendation, or commitment.
faculties.return_emphasis: Gestalt, decisive fit or tension, taste basis, conceptual bearings, and interpretive uncertainty.

faculties.name: prosocial-influence
faculties.owns: Transparent advocated change through legitimate reasons, motivation, friction, supports, resistance, safeguards, and informed refusal.
faculties.activate_when: Adoption or behavior change is explicitly sought and the audience must retain agency.
faculties.must_not_own: Unresolved governance or consent, coercion, evidence inflation, timing and style, or commitment authority.
faculties.return_emphasis: Legitimate change strategy, safeguards, support, resistance, informed refusal, and stop condition.

faculties.name: instrumental-agency
faculties.owns: Authorized action choreography, preconditions, state checks, idempotence or rollback, recovery, and truthful disposition.
faculties.activate_when: An authorized intention must become observable state through real tools or environments.
faculties.must_not_own: Authorization, mission choice, domain truth, measurement validity, or verification merely because a tool returned success.
faculties.return_emphasis: Precondition, attempted action, observed state, recovery state, and verification still required.
